title: Autism Pride!
description: Replaces the title screen splash text with a friendly autism pride message <3
body:
![A cropped screenshot of the Minecraft title screen, the splash text reading "Autism Pride!" with a neurodivergency symbol to the right of it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ce93ddffc2cc27f941cafa46b3a0644e00b162d.png)

# Autism Pride!

**Autism Pride!** is a tiny mod that replaces the title screen splash text with a friendly autism pride message, including the rainbow infinity sign commonly used by the neurodivergency community.

This mod is for members of the autistic community, like me, who felt a surprising lack of neurodivergency-focused mods in the gaming community. It also _technically_ counts as a library!

## Installation

- Install **[Quilt Loader](https://quiltmc.org)** and **[Quilted Fabric API / Quilt Standard Libraries](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)**.
- Download the **[latest version of the mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/autism-pride!/versions)** for your respective Minecraft version.
- Drag **Autism Pride!** and **Quilted Fabric API / Quilt Standard Libraries** into your **mods** folder.
- **You're done!**
